attorneys: Edward R. Korman argued the cause for the United States. With him on the brief were Solicitor General Griswold, Acting Assistant Attorney General Wood, and Alan S. Rosenthal., Kalman Finkel argued the cause for appellee. With him on the brief was Leon B. Polsky.
judges: Blackmun, Burger, White, Powell, Rehnquist, Stewart, Douglas, Brennan, Marshall, Bhennan
